evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent detects the missing topic, threat model, and format. It pauses to ask the user targeted discovery questions before creating any directories, writing files, or assuming the threat vector.

evaluations.prompt: Prepare a red team review for the authentication logic focusing on OWASP vulnerabilities for ChatGPT.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent has all required information but DO NOT execute yet. It drafts a 'Red Team Bundle Plan' including the target, format, proposed persona prompt, and proposed files. It explicitly asks the user for confirmation ('Does this look right?') BEFORE running the python scripts or writing to disk.

evaluations.prompt: Yes, that plan looks perfect. Go ahead.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent creates the temp/red-team-review-[topic] directory, writes the agreed prompt to prompt.md, places prompt.md as the VERY FIRST item in the file-manifest.json, successfully delegates to the correct bundler script based on the format, and provides handoff instructions.
